location.searchHint: Enter a city, ZIP code, or address to see weather somewhere else.
location.noResults: No matching places. Try a city or ZIP code.
location.permissionDescription: Search for a city above, or allow location access in your browser to see weather for your current area.
location.permissionDenied: Location access was denied. Search for a city instead.
location.lookupFailed: We found your position but could not resolve your city. Check that the backend is running, then try again or search for a city.
location.autocompleteFailed: Could not load place suggestions. Check your connection and try again.
location.placeResolveFailed: Could not resolve the selected place. Try another result or search again.

error.boundaryDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please refresh the page.
error.loadFailed: Some weather data could not be loaded
error.sectionFallback: This section could not be loaded.
